PepsiCo's acquisition of Poppi highlights big players' interest in healthy drinks.

topStories.title: Zerodha’s Rs 7,400 crore MTF book highlights retail shift from cash trading to leveraged bets: Nithin Kamath
topStories.summary: India's retail trading has shifted towards leveraged products like Margin Trading Facility (MTF) since the pandemic, with cash market activity seeing slower growth. Zerodha's MTF book has surged to nearly Rs 7,400 crore, driven by increased appetite for leveraged positions. Traders are cautioned to consider brokerage costs alongside interest rates, as these can significantly impact returns on leveraged trades.

business.title: Q4 Results 07th May Highlights: MRF, KVB & Craftsman Automation Q4 profit rise, Bharat Forge, Coromandel International profit decline, CarTrade & Indoco shares rally; BSE, Pidilite, Britannia, Lupin, Dabur, Biocon, Thermax, ACME Solar, Shakti Pumps anno - BusinessLine

1. Q4 Results 07th May Highlights: MRF, KVB & Craftsman Automation Q4 profit rise, Bharat Forge, Coromandel International profit decline, CarTrade & Indoco shares rally; BSE, Pidilite, Britannia, Lupin, Dabur, Biocon, Thermax, ACME Solar, Shakti Pumps anno  BusinessLine

business.title: Bharat Forge Q4 results: Cons PAT falls 17% YoY to Rs 233 crore, revenue up 18%
business.summary: Bharat Forge reported a 17% year-on-year fall in net profit to Rs 233 crore for the March-ended quarter, despite an 18% revenue growth to Rs 4,528 crore. The company recommended a final dividend of Rs 6.50 per equity share. Despite demand challenges, Bharat Forge secured significant new orders, particularly in defence.

business.title: Nationwide ban soon on herbicide Paraquat Dichloride over toxicity concerns, health risks
business.summary: Experts linked the herbicide to fatal poisoning, kidney failure, lung fibrosis and Parkinson’s disease; proposed ban could disrupt a large agrochemical market and farming practices

business.title: MRF’s revenue crosses ₹30,000-crore milestone in a fiscal in FY26

business.title: Realty sector hit as Bengal workers yet to return after voting
business.summary: Labour shortage is beginning to weigh on construction timelines, execution costs and project planning, particularly in southern markets

business.title: Britannia Q4 Results: Profit rises 21% YoY to Rs 678 crore; co declares Rs 90.5 dividend
business.summary: Britannia Q4 Results: FMCG company Britannia Industries reported 21% year-on-year (YoY) growth in its consolidated net profit at Rs 678 crore in the fourth quarter, compared with Rs 560 crore in the year-ago quarter.

business.title: IIT Madras Global to launch centres in 4 countries by year end
business.summary: The centres, which will be set up in the UK, Germany, Malaysia and Dubai, will add to the recently opened and operational facility in the United States

business.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
business.summary: Indian benchmark indices ended slightly lower amid weakness in FMCG, IT and banking stocks, while analysts highlighted improving technical indicators and bullish breakout signals. Positive market breadth, easing volatility and strong investor participation supported optimism despite global market uncertainty and stock-specific selling pressure.

business.title: Govt formation hangs in balance in TN as Governor demands proof of majority
business.summary: The Dravidian parties too have been in a huddle, with both AIADMK and DMK holding a meeting of their respective MLAs and deliberating on next steps.

business.title: Op Sindoor Anniversary: India prepared to tackle China-Pakistan-Turkey axis

business.title: Skyroot Aerospace becomes unicorn after raising $60 million ahead of Vikram-1 launch

business.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Nippon Life, Bharat Dynamics on Friday for gains up to 14%
business.summary: Nifty ended marginally lower despite showing a consolidation breakout and improving technical indicators. Analysts expect bullish momentum to continue with upside potential in the near term. Nippon Life India Asset Management and Bharat Dynamics were highlighted as attractive trading opportunities based on strong chart patterns.

business.title: Showing solidarity with Trinamool, Samajwadi Party’s Akhilesh Yadav meets Mamata Banerjee, says democracy in Bengal "undermined"

business.title: Suryoday Small Finance Bank reports Q4 profit at Rs 49 crore
business.summary: Suryoday Small Finance Bank reported a strong turnaround in fourth-quarter earnings with improved profitability and higher operating profit. The lender also recorded annual profit growth while reducing its gross non-performing assets ratio, reflecting better asset quality and improved financial performance during the year.

business.title: Maharashtra signs ₹500 crore recycling deal with Recove Ventures to tackle India’s HDPE/PP gap
business.summary: The agreement’s first project is a 1,100-tonne-per-month HDPE and PP recycling facility at Additional Jalgaon MIDC, a priority D+ industrial zone, with an investment of over ₹35 crore

business.title: ED raids office of close aide of Punjab CM’s OSD

business.title: US stocks today: Whirlpool shares plunge 12% as earnings cut, ‘recession-like’ conditions rattle investors
business.summary: Whirlpool shares tumbled after the appliance maker cut its 2026 earnings outlook, suspended dividends and warned that weakening consumer demand now resembles “recession-like” conditions. Rising costs, a soft housing market and cautious household spending added to concerns over the broader outlook for discretionary consumption.

business.title: US market today: Shake Shack misses estimates as fast food demand weakens, shares drop 28%
business.summary: Fast ​food chain operator Shake Shack on Thursday swung to ​a quarterly loss and missed revenue estimates, hurt by rising commodity costs such as that of beef and weak consumer spending, sending its shares down about ‌28% in ⁠early ⁠market trading.

business.title: US market today: Aircraft parts maker Howmet lifts annual forecasts on robust demand
business.summary: Howmet Aerospace on Thursday reported first-quarter profit and revenue ​above estimates and lifted its ​annual forecast on the back of growth ​in its commercial aerospace and industrial gas turbine businesses.

business.title: US stocks today: Datadog raises annual forecast on strong cloud security demand, shares jump 36%
business.summary: Cloud security firm Datadog has boosted its annual forecast. The company surpassed Wall Street expectations for its first quarter. This surge is due to strong demand for its cloud security products. Increased artificial intelligence adoption and cloud migration are fueling this growth. Datadog now anticipates higher revenue and profit for the full year 2026.

business.title: US market today: Carlyle profit misses as asset sales fail to boost shareholder income
business.summary: Global ​investment firm Carlyle reported lower-than-expected profit for ​the first quarter on Thursday, as asset sales failed to translate to income ​for shareholders.

business.title: US market today: McDonald's focus on value, big new burger drive sales in first quarter
business.summary: McDonald's posted better-than-expected sales in the first quarter as a new burger - and a continuing emphasis on value - brought in customers.

business.title: Kennametal India Q3 revenue jumps 39% to Rs 403 crore, net profit doubles to Rs 51 crore
business.summary: Kennametal India reported sharp growth in quarterly revenue and profit, supported by strong demand for hard metal products and volume expansion. Rising raw material costs increased expenses, while the company highlighted supply chain management efforts and announced an interim dividend for shareholders.
